# Code generated by go run ./cmd/jobdb-api-snapshot -packages api/packages.txt; DO NOT EDIT.

package github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb
type AppError struct
  field Payload AppErrorPayload
method AppError.As func(target any) bool
method AppError.Error func() string
type AppErrorOutcome struct
  field Error AppErrorPayload
type AppErrorPayload struct
  field Message string `json:"message"`
  field Level string `json:"level,omitempty"`
  field Attrs map[string]interface{} `json:"attrs,omitempty"`
  field InputRef *InputReference `json:"input_ref,omitempty"`
  field Stacktrace []string `json:"stacktrace,omitempty"`
func AppMetadataFromStoredMetadata func(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) encoding/json.RawMessage
func AppendScheduleFailureBit func(bits string, success bool, windowSize int) string
type ApplicationInputBytes struct
  field Data []byte
type ApplicationOutputBytes struct
  field Data []byte
type ApplicationOutputOutcome struct
  field Output ApplicationOutputBytes
type Artifact interface
  method ArtifactKey func() (ArtifactKey, error)
  method Bytes func(ctx context.Context) ([]byte, error)
  method Cleanup func() error
  method Name func() string
  method Open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)
  method SaveToFile func(ctx context.Context, path string) error
  method Sha256 func(ctx context.Context) (string, error)
  method Size func() int64
  method WriteTo func(ctx context.Context, w io.Writer) error
type ArtifactGetter interface
  method GetArtifact func(tenantId string, key ArtifactKey) (Artifact, error)
type ArtifactInfo struct
  field ID string
  field Name string
  field ContentType string
  field SizeBytes int64
  field Sha256 string
  field Key *ArtifactKey
type ArtifactKey struct
  field JobId string `json:"jobId"`
  field TaskOrdinal int64 `json:"taskOrdinal"`
  field Name string `json:"name"`
  field SizeBytes int64 `json:"sizeBytes"`
method ArtifactKey.ToLazyArtifact func(getter ArtifactGetter, tenantId string) Artifact
method ArtifactKey.Validate func() error
type ArtifactReader interface
  method Name func() string
  method Open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)
  method Size func() int64
type ArtifactRef struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Ordinal int64
  field Name string
  field Digest string
type ArtifactUpload struct
  field Name string
  field Size int64
  field Open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)
func AsDuration func(t time.Duration) *Duration
func AssignArtifactKey func(art Artifact, key ArtifactKey)
func BuildJobMetadataEnvelope func(appMetadata encoding/json.RawMessage, internal RuntimeJobMetadata) (encoding/json.RawMessage, error)
type CancelJob struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Reason string
type CancelJobRequest struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Reason string
  field WorkerID string
func CanonicalJobSchema func(schema encoding/json.RawMessage) (encoding/json.RawMessage, error)
type Chapter struct
  field Ordinal int64
  field TaskType string
  field Body ChapterBody
  field InputHash string
  field CreatedAt time.Time
  field Metadata ChapterMetadata
  field Artifacts []StoredArtifact
type ChapterBody interface
type ChapterMetadata struct
  field Fields map[string]ChapterMetadataValue
const ChapterMetadataBool ChapterMetadataKind = "bool"
const ChapterMetadataDouble ChapterMetadataKind = "double"
const ChapterMetadataInt ChapterMetadataKind = "int"
type ChapterMetadataKind string
const ChapterMetadataList ChapterMetadataKind = "list"
const ChapterMetadataMap ChapterMetadataKind = "map"
const ChapterMetadataNull ChapterMetadataKind = "null"
const ChapterMetadataString ChapterMetadataKind = "string"
type ChapterMetadataValue struct
  field Kind ChapterMetadataKind
  field Bool bool
  field Int int64
  field Double float64
  field String string
  field List []ChapterMetadataValue
  field Map map[string]ChapterMetadataValue
type ChapterOutcome interface
type ChapterRef struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Ordinal int64
  field Attempt int
  field TaskType string
type CompleteExecutionRequest struct
  field Status string
  field Detail string
  field Chapter *Chapter
  field ArtifactUploads []ArtifactUpload

  field JobKey JobKey
  field Capability string
  field ResumeNeed string
  field InputOrdinal int64
  field OutputOrdinal int64
  field InputHash string
  field Data TaskData
type Data = encoding/json.RawMessage
func DecodeListJobsPageToken func(tok string) (time.Time, JobKey, error)
const DefaultListJobsPageSize untyped int = 100
func DefaultRunPolicy func() RunPolicy
type Duration int64
method Duration.JSONSchema func() *github.com/invopop/jsonschema.Schema
method Duration.MarshalYAML func() (interface{}, error)
method Duration.String func() string
method Duration.ToDuration func() time.Duration
method Duration.UnmarshalYAML func(unmarshal func(interface{}) error) error
func EncodeListJobsPageToken func(createdAt time.Time, jobKey JobKey) (string, error)

  embedded SimpleTaskData SimpleTaskData
  field Kind string

type ExecutionLease interface
  method Capability func() string
  method Complete func(ctx context.Context, req CompleteExecutionRequest) error
  method Job func() JobHandle
  method KeepAlive func(ctx context.Context) error
  method LeaseID func() string
  method Payload func() encoding/json.RawMessage
  method Reschedule func(ctx context.Context, req RescheduleExecutionRequest) error
  method StopKeepAlive func()
  method SubmitJob func(ctx context.Context, req SubmitJobRequest) (JobHandle, error)
  method SubmitRestartJob func(ctx context.Context, req SubmitRestartJobRequest) (JobHandle, error)
func ExtractParentJobID func(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) (string, bool, error)
func ExtractScheduleOccurrenceMetadata func(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) (ScheduleOccurrenceMetadata, bool, error)
func ExtractTaskDataResult func(data TaskData) (TaskData, error)
type FieldName string
type GetJobLeaseRequest struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field WorkerID string
  field Capabilities []string
  field LeaseDuration time.Duration

  field IncludeInputs bool

  field IncludeArtifacts bool
  field IncludeAttemptInputs bool

  field Job JobRunSummary

func InitialScheduleFire func(trigger ScheduleTrigger, now time.Time) (*time.Time, error)
type InputReference struct
  field Ordinal int64 `json:"ordinal"`
  field Hash string `json:"hash,omitempty"`
func IsAppError func(err error) bool
func IsConflict func(err error) bool

  field Ordinal int64
  field Attempt int
  field WorkerID string
  field CreatedAt time.Time
  field InputRef *InputReference
  field Output *TaskIO
  field Outcome TaskOutcome
  field Tasks []TaskRun

  field Outcome ChapterOutcome
type JobData = TaskData
type JobFailedError struct
  field Cause error

method JobFailedError.Unwrap func() error
type JobHandle struct
  field JobKey JobKey
type JobInfo struct
  field Status JobStatus
  field Data TaskData
  field SchemaHash string

  field TenantId string `json:"tenantId"`

method JobKey.Validate func() error

  field Internal *RuntimeJobMetadata `json:"internal,omitempty"`
const JobPrereqComplete JobPrereqCondition = "complete"
type JobPrereqCondition string
const JobPrereqSuccess JobPrereqCondition = "success"
type JobPrerequisite struct
  field JobID string
  field Condition JobPrereqCondition

  field JobKey JobKey
  field JobType string
  field Status JobStatus

  field ArchivedAt *time.Time
  field Metadata encoding/json.RawMessage

type JobSchemaInfo struct
  field TenantId string
  field SchemaHash string
  field Schema encoding/json.RawMessage
  field State JobSchemaState
  field CreatedAt time.Time
  field ArchivedAt *time.Time

  field TenantId string
  field SchemaHash string

const JobSchemaListStateArchived JobSchemaListState = "ARCHIVED"

  method ArchiveJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, key JobSchemaKey) (JobSchemaInfo, error)
  method GetJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, key JobSchemaKey) (JobSchemaInfo, error)
  method ListJobSchemas func(ctx context.Context, req ListJobSchemasRequest) (ListJobSchemasResponse, error)
  method RegisterJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, req RegisterJobSchemaRequest) (JobSchemaInfo, error)
type JobSchemaSelector struct
  field Hash string
  field Schema encoding/json.RawMessage

  field Input ApplicationInputBytes
type JobStatus string
const JobStatusActive JobStatus = "ACTIVE"

const JobStatusCancelled JobStatus = "CANCELLED"
const JobStatusCompleted JobStatus = "COMPLETED"
const JobStatusCrashConcern JobStatus = "CRASH_CONCERN"
const JobStatusExpired JobStatus = "EXPIRED"
const JobStatusPendingJobs JobStatus = "PENDING_JOBS"
const JobStatusReady JobStatus = "READY"
type JobStore string
const JobStoreActive JobStore = "ACTIVE"
const JobStoreArchived JobStore = "ARCHIVED"
type JobSummary struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Status JobStatus
  field JobType string
  field NextNeed *string
  field WaitFor []string
  field AvailableAt time.Time
  field ExpiresAt *time.Time
  field LeaseExpiresAt *time.Time
  field CancelRequested bool
  field CreatedAt time.Time
  field ArchivedAt *time.Time
  field Payload encoding/json.RawMessage
  field Metadata encoding/json.RawMessage
  field SchemaHash string
  field ParentJobID string
  field TaskWaitInput *int64
  field TaskWaitOutput *int64
  field TaskWaitInputHash *string
  field TaskWaitNext *string

  field JobType string
  field TaskType string
func JobTypeFromNextNeed func(nextNeed string) string

  field JobKey JobKey
  field StartOrdinal int64
  field EndOrdinal *int64

  field TenantId string
  field State JobSchemaListState
type ListJobSchemasResponse struct
  field Schemas []JobSchemaInfo
type ListJobsRequest struct
  field TenantIds []string
  field Statuses []JobStatus
  field Stores []JobStore
  field JobTypes []string
  field JobTasks []JobTaskFilter
  field JobKeys []JobKey
  field ParentJobIDs []string
  field RootOnly bool
  field MetadataFilter MetadataFilter
  field CreatedAfter *time.Time
  field CreatedBefore *time.Time
  field PageSize int
  field PageToken string

  field Jobs []JobSummary
  field NextPageToken string

  field ScheduleKey ScheduleKey
  field ScheduledAfter *time.Time
  field ScheduledBefore *time.Time
  field Statuses []JobStatus
  field PageSize int

  field Runs []ScheduleRunSummary

  field Schedules []ScheduleInfo

const MaxListJobsPageSize untyped int = 200
func MergeScheduleOccurrenceMetadata func(appMetadata encoding/json.RawMessage, occurrence ScheduleOccurrenceMetadata, manual bool) (encoding/json.RawMessage, error)
func Metadata func() MetadataFilter
type MetadataFilter interface
  method AndFilter func(MetadataFilter) (MetadataFilter, error)
  method EqualFilter func(FieldName, any) (MetadataFilter, error)
  method OrFilter func(MetadataFilter) (MetadataFilter, error)
type MetadataPredicate struct
  field Path []string
  field Values []any
func MetadataPredicates func(filter MetadataFilter) ([]MetadataPredicate, error)
func NewArtifact func(name string, opener func() (io.ReadCloser, int64, error), cleanup func() error) Artifact
func NewArtifactFromBytes func(name string, data []byte) Artifact
func NewArtifactFromFile func(name string, filePath string) (Artifact, error)
func NewArtifactFromFileNoCleanup func(name string, filePath string) (Artifact, error)
func NewArtifactFromReader func(name string, r io.Reader, size int64) Artifact
func NewExistingJobMismatchError func(message string) error
func NewSystemError func(payload SystemErrorPayload) error
func NewTaskData func(data any, artifacts ...Artifact) (TaskData, error)
func NewTaskDataOrPanic func(data any, artifacts ...Artifact) TaskData
func NewTimeoutError func(kind string, after time.Duration, scope string, inputRef *InputReference, retryable bool) error
func NextScheduleFire func(trigger ScheduleTrigger, after time.Time) (*time.Time, error)
type NonRetryableError interface
  method NonRetryable func() bool
func NormalizeJSON func(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) encoding/json.RawMessage
func NormalizeScheduleOverlapPolicy func(policy ScheduleOverlapPolicy) ScheduleOverlapPolicy
func ParseJobKey func(s string) (JobKey, error)
type PollWorkRequest struct
  field TenantId string
  field WorkerID string
  field Capabilities []string
  field Limit int
  field LongPollUntil *time.Time
  field LeaseDuration time.Duration
  field MetadataEquals []MetadataPredicate

  field LeaseID string
  field LeaseToken string
  field Ref ChapterRef
  field Chapter Chapter
  field ArtifactUploads []ArtifactUpload

  field TenantId string
  field Schema encoding/json.RawMessage

  field NextNeed string
  field WaitUntil *time.Time
  field WaitForJobIDs []string
  field Payload encoding/json.RawMessage
  field AlternateNeed string
  field AlternateAfter *time.Duration
func ResolveJobSchemaSelector func(selector *JobSchemaSelector) (hash string, schema encoding/json.RawMessage, hasInline bool, err error)
type RestartExtraChapter struct
  field Output ApplicationOutputBytes
type RetryPolicy struct
  field InitialInterval Duration `yaml:"initial_interval,omitempty"`
  field BackoffCoefficient float64 `yaml:"backoff_coefficient,omitempty"`
  field MaximumInterval Duration `yaml:"maximum_interval,omitempty"`
  field MaximumAttempts int32 `yaml:"maximum_attempts,omitempty"`
  field NonRetryableErrorTypes []string `yaml:"non_retryable_error_types,omitempty"`
type RunPolicy struct
  field Retry RetryPolicy `yaml:"retry,omitempty"`
  field InvocationTimeout *Duration `yaml:"invocation_timeout,omitempty"`
  field TotalTimeout *Duration `yaml:"total_timeout,omitempty"`
type RuntimeJobMetadata struct
  field Schedule *ScheduleOccurrenceMetadata `json:"schedule,omitempty"`
  field SchemaHash string `json:"schemaHash,omitempty"`
  field ParentJobID string `json:"parentJobId,omitempty"`
type ScheduleFailureHistory struct
  field Bits string `json:"bits,omitempty"`
  field WindowSize int `json:"windowSize,omitempty"`
type ScheduleFailurePolicy struct
  field MinSuccessPercent int `json:"minSuccessPercent,omitempty"`
  field WindowSize int `json:"windowSize,omitempty"`
  field MaxSequentialFailures int `json:"maxSequentialFailures,omitempty"`
func ScheduleFailurePolicyViolated func(bits string, policy ScheduleFailurePolicy) bool
type ScheduleInfo struct
  field TenantId string
  field ScheduleId string
  field ScheduleKey ScheduleKey
  field State ScheduleState
  field EffectiveState ScheduleState
  field Generation int64
  field SpecHash string
  field Trigger ScheduleTrigger
  field Target ScheduleTarget
  field OverlapPolicy ScheduleOverlapPolicy
  field FailurePolicy ScheduleFailurePolicy
  field NextFireAt *time.Time
  field NextJobKey *JobKey
  field CreatedAt time.Time
  field UpdatedAt time.Time
type ScheduleKey struct
  field TenantId string `json:"tenantId"`
  field ScheduleId string `json:"scheduleId"`
method ScheduleKey.Validate func() error
func ScheduleManualJobID func(scheduleID string, requestID string) string
const ScheduleMetadataKind untyped string = "schedule_tick"
type ScheduleMutationRequest struct
  field ScheduleKey ScheduleKey
  field ExpectedGeneration *int64
  field RequestTime time.Time
  field WorkerID string
type ScheduleOccurrenceMetadata struct
  field ScheduleId string `json:"scheduleId"`
  field Kind string `json:"kind"`
  field Generation int64 `json:"generation"`
  field SpecHash string `json:"specHash"`
  field ScheduledAt time.Time `json:"scheduledAt"`
  field RunId string `json:"runId"`
  field Manual bool `json:"manual"`
  field BackfillId string `json:"backfillId,omitempty"`
  field PreviousJobId string `json:"previousJobId,omitempty"`
  field FailureHistory ScheduleFailureHistory `json:"failureHistory,omitempty"`
type ScheduleOverlapPolicy string
const ScheduleOverlapSerial ScheduleOverlapPolicy = "serial"
func ScheduleRunID func(t time.Time) string
func ScheduleRunJobID func(scheduleID string, generation int64, scheduledAt time.Time) string
type ScheduleRunSummary struct
  embedded JobSummary JobSummary
  field ScheduleId string
  field ScheduledAt time.Time
  field ReasonCode string
type ScheduleSpec struct
  field Trigger ScheduleTrigger `json:"trigger"`
  field Target ScheduleTarget `json:"-"`
  field OverlapPolicy ScheduleOverlapPolicy `json:"overlapPolicy,omitempty"`
  field FailurePolicy ScheduleFailurePolicy `json:"failurePolicy,omitempty"`
  field Paused bool `json:"paused,omitempty"`
func ScheduleSpecHash func(trigger ScheduleTrigger, target ScheduleTarget, overlap ScheduleOverlapPolicy, failure ScheduleFailurePolicy) (string, error)
type ScheduleState string
const ScheduleStateActive ScheduleState = "ACTIVE"
const ScheduleStateArchived ScheduleState = "ARCHIVED"
const ScheduleStateFailurePaused ScheduleState = "FAILURE_PAUSED"
const ScheduleStatePaused ScheduleState = "PAUSED"
type ScheduleTarget struct
  field JobType string `json:"jobType"`
  field Data JobData `json:"-"`
  field RunPolicy RunPolicy `json:"runPolicy,omitempty"`
  field Metadata encoding/json.RawMessage `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
type ScheduleTrigger struct
  field Kind ScheduleTriggerKind `json:"kind"`
  field Expression string `json:"expression,omitempty"`
  field Timezone string `json:"timezone,omitempty"`
  field StartAt *time.Time `json:"startAt,omitempty"`
  field EndAt *time.Time `json:"endAt,omitempty"`
  field Interval time.Duration `json:"interval,omitempty"`
const ScheduleTriggerCron ScheduleTriggerKind = "cron"
const ScheduleTriggerInterval ScheduleTriggerKind = "interval"
type ScheduleTriggerKind string
type SimpleTaskData struct
  field Data Data
  field Artifacts []Artifact
method SimpleTaskData.GetArtifacts func() ([]Artifact, error)
method SimpleTaskData.GetData func() (Data, error)
method SimpleTaskData.GetDataOrPanic func() Data
type StoredArtifact struct
  field Name string
  field Digest string
  field Size int64
func StripRuntimeMetadata func(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) encoding/json.RawMessage
type SubmitJob struct
  field TenantId string
  field JobType string
  field JobID string
  field Data JobData
  field RunPolicy RunPolicy
  field Metadata encoding/json.RawMessage
  field Schema *JobSchemaSelector
  field AvailableAt *time.Time
  field Prerequisites []JobPrerequisite
type SubmitJobRequest struct
  field Job SubmitJob
  field WorkerID string
  field RequestTime time.Time
type SubmitRestartJob struct
  field PriorJobKey JobKey
  field LastStepToKeep int64
  field JobID string
  field ExtraTaskInput TaskData
  field ExtraTaskOutput TaskData
  field Schema *JobSchemaSelector
  field Prerequisites []JobPrerequisite
type SubmitRestartJobRequest struct
  field Job SubmitRestartJob
  field WorkerID string
  field RequestTime time.Time
type SystemError struct
  field Payload SystemErrorPayload
method SystemError.As func(target any) bool
method SystemError.Error func() string
type SystemErrorOutcome struct
  field Error SystemErrorPayload
type SystemErrorPayload struct
  field Message string `json:"message"`
  field Component string `json:"component,omitempty"`
  field Code string `json:"code,omitempty"`
  field Retryable bool `json:"retryable,omitempty"`
  field InputRef *InputReference `json:"input_ref,omitempty"`
  field Stacktrace []string `json:"stacktrace,omitempty"`
type TaskAttempt struct
  field Ordinal int64
  field Attempt int
  field WorkerID string
  field CreatedAt time.Time
  field InputHash string
  field InputRef *InputReference
  field RunPolicy *RunPolicy
  field Retryable *bool
  field MaxAttempts *int
  field NextAttemptAt *time.Time
  field BackoffMillis *int64
  field Input *TaskIO
  field Output *TaskIO
  field State string
  field Runtime *TaskRuntime
  field Outcome TaskOutcome
type TaskAttemptOutcomeChapter struct
  field Outcome ChapterOutcome
const TaskAttemptStateFailed untyped string = "FAILED"
const TaskAttemptStateLeased untyped string = "LEASED"
const TaskAttemptStateReady untyped string = "READY"
const TaskAttemptStateRunning untyped string = "RUNNING"
const TaskAttemptStateSucceeded untyped string = "SUCCEEDED"
const TaskAttemptStateWaiting untyped string = "WAITING"
type TaskData interface
  method GetArtifacts func() ([]Artifact, error)
  method GetData func() (Data, error)
  method GetDataOrPanic func() Data
type TaskDataResultCarrier interface
  embedded TaskData
  method TaskDataResult func() (TaskData, error)
type TaskError struct
  field Kind string
  field Message string
  field Level string
  field Attrs map[string]interface{}
  field Component string
  field Code string
  field Retryable *bool
  field Scope string
  field After *Duration
  field InputRef *InputReference
  field Stacktrace []string
const TaskErrorKindApp untyped string = "APP"
const TaskErrorKindSystem untyped string = "SYSTEM"
const TaskErrorKindTimeout untyped string = "TIMEOUT"
type TaskIO struct
  field Data encoding/json.RawMessage
  field Artifacts []ArtifactInfo
type TaskOutcome struct
  field Status string
  field PayloadKind string
  field Error *TaskError
const TaskOutcomeStatusFailed untyped string = "FAILED"
const TaskOutcomeStatusSucceeded untyped string = "SUCCEEDED"
type TaskRun struct
  field TaskRunID string
  field TaskType string
  field Attempts []TaskAttempt
type TaskRuntime struct
  field LeaseOwner *string
  field LeaseExpiresAt *time.Time
  field NextNeed *string
  field AvailableAt *time.Time
  field WaitFor []string
type TimeoutError struct
  field Payload TimeoutPayload
method TimeoutError.As func(target any) bool
method TimeoutError.Error func() string
type TimeoutOutcome struct
  field Timeout TimeoutPayload
type TimeoutPayload struct
  field Scope string `json:"scope"`
  field After Duration `json:"after"`
  field Retryable bool `json:"retryable"`
  field InputRef *InputReference `json:"input_ref,omitempty"`
  field Kind string `json:"kind,omitempty"`
  field Component string `json:"component,omitempty"`
  field Code string `json:"code,omitempty"`
  field Message string `json:"message,omitempty"`
const TimeoutScopeInvocation untyped string = "invocation"
const TimeoutScopeTotal untyped string = "total"
type TriggerScheduleRequest struct
  field ScheduleKey ScheduleKey
  field RequestID string
  field RequestTime time.Time
  field WorkerID string
func TxFromCtx func(ctx context.Context) (*gorm.io/gorm.DB, bool)
type UpsertScheduleRequest struct
  field TenantId string
  field ScheduleId string
  field Trigger ScheduleTrigger
  field Target ScheduleTarget
  field OverlapPolicy ScheduleOverlapPolicy
  field FailurePolicy ScheduleFailurePolicy
  field Paused bool
  field ExpectedGeneration *int64
  field RequestTime time.Time
  field WorkerID string
func ValidateApplicationMetadata func(raw encoding/json.RawMessage) error
func ValidateJobSchemaHash func(hash string) error
func ValidateScheduleRequest func(req UpsertScheduleRequest) error
func WithTx func(ctx context.Context, tx *gorm.io/gorm.DB) context.Context
type WorkflowRuntime interface
  method ArchiveSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req ScheduleMutationRequest) (ScheduleInfo, error)
  method CancelJob func(ctx context.Context, req CancelJobRequest) error
  method CompleteTaskIfWaiting func(ctx context.Context, req CompleteTaskIfWaitingRequest) error
  method GetChapter func(ctx context.Context, ref ChapterRef) (Chapter, error)
  method GetJob func(ctx context.Context, jobKey JobKey) (JobInfo, error)
  method GetJobLease func(ctx context.Context, req GetJobLeaseRequest) (ExecutionLease, error)
  method GetSchedule func(ctx context.Context, key ScheduleKey) (ScheduleInfo, error)
  method ListChapters func(ctx context.Context, req ListChaptersRequest) ([]Chapter, error)
  method ListJobs func(ctx context.Context, req ListJobsRequest) (ListJobsResponse, error)
  method ListScheduleRuns func(ctx context.Context, req ListScheduleRunsRequest) (ListScheduleRunsResponse, error)
  method ListSchedules func(ctx context.Context, req ListSchedulesRequest) (ListSchedulesResponse, error)
  method OpenArtifact func(ctx context.Context, ref ArtifactRef) (ArtifactReader, error)
  method PauseSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req ScheduleMutationRequest) (ScheduleInfo, error)
  method PollWork func(ctx context.Context, req PollWorkRequest) ([]ExecutionLease, error)
  method PutChapter func(ctx context.Context, req PutChapterRequest) error
  method ResumeSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req ScheduleMutationRequest) (ScheduleInfo, error)
  method SubmitJob func(ctx context.Context, req SubmitJobRequest) (JobHandle, error)
  method SubmitRestartJob func(ctx context.Context, req SubmitRestartJobRequest) (JobHandle, error)
  method TriggerSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req TriggerScheduleRequest) (JobHandle, error)
  method UpsertSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req UpsertScheduleRequest) (ScheduleInfo, error)

package github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/workflow
type AppError = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.AppError
type AppErrorOutcome = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.AppErrorOutcome
type AppErrorPayload = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.AppErrorPayload
type ApplicationInputBytes = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ApplicationInputBytes
type ApplicationOutputBytes = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ApplicationOutputBytes
type ApplicationOutputOutcome = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ApplicationOutputOutcome
type Artifact = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Artifact
type ArtifactInfo = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactInfo
type ArtifactKey = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactKey
type ArtifactReader = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactReader
type ArtifactRef = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactRef
type ArtifactUpload = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactUpload
func AsDuration func(t time.Duration) *Duration
func AsWorkSet func(jobWorker JobWorker, taskWorkers ...TaskWorker) (*WorkSet, error)
func AsWorkSetWithOptions func(jobWorker JobWorker, opts WorkRegistrationOptions, taskWorkers ...TaskWorker) (*WorkSet, error)
func AssignArtifactKey func(art Artifact, key ArtifactKey)
type CancelJob = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CancelJob
type CancelJobRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CancelJobRequest
type Chapter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Chapter
type ChapterBody = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterBody
type ChapterMetadata = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadata
const ChapterMetadataBool github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "bool"
const ChapterMetadataDouble github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "double"
const ChapterMetadataInt github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "int"
type ChapterMetadataKind = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind
const ChapterMetadataList github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "list"
const ChapterMetadataMap github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "map"
const ChapterMetadataNull github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "null"
const ChapterMetadataString github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataKind = "string"
type ChapterMetadataValue = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterMetadataValue
type ChapterOutcome = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterOutcome
type ChapterRef = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterRef
type CompleteExecutionRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CompleteExecutionRequest
type CompleteTaskIfWaitingRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CompleteTaskIfWaitingRequest
type Data = encoding/json.RawMessage
const DefaultListJobsPageSize untyped int = 100
func DefaultRunPolicy func() RunPolicy
type Duration = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Duration
type Engine interface
  embedded jobRunApi
  embedded taskRunApi
  embedded jobLeaseApi
  embedded loopWorkerApi
  embedded jobsListApi
  embedded schedulesApi
  method GetArtifact func(tenantId string, key ArtifactKey) (Artifact, error)
  method RegisterWorkers func(workset *WorkSet) error
type EngineBuilder struct
method EngineBuilder.BuildEngine func() (Engine, error)
method EngineBuilder.PlusWorkers func(jobWorker JobWorker, taskWorkers ...TaskWorker) *EngineBuilder
method EngineBuilder.PlusWorkersWithOptions func(jobWorker JobWorker, opts WorkRegistrationOptions, taskWorkers ...TaskWorker) *EngineBuilder
method EngineBuilder.WithAwaitRecycleThreshold func(d time.Duration) *EngineBuilder
method EngineBuilder.WithLogger func(logger *log/slog.Logger) *EngineBuilder
method EngineBuilder.WithMaxActive func(maxActive int) *EngineBuilder
method EngineBuilder.WithRuntime func(runtime WorkflowRuntime) *EngineBuilder
method EngineBuilder.WithWorkerTenantId func(tenantId string) *EngineBuilder
type EnvelopedTaskData = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.EnvelopedTaskData
var ErrArtifactKeyUnavailable error
var ErrChapterNotFound error
var ErrConflict error
var ErrExecutionLeaseLost error
var ErrExistingJobMismatch error
var ErrJobCancelled error
var ErrJobFailed error
var ErrJobNotComplete error
var ErrJobNotFound error
var ErrMissingInputHash error
var ErrReplayShouldNeverMutate error
var ErrWorkflowNotDeterministic error
type ExecutionLease = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ExecutionLease
func ExtractTaskDataResult func(data TaskData) (TaskData, error)
type FieldName = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.FieldName
type FindTasksWaitingRequest struct
  field JobType string
  field TaskType string
  field TenantIds []string
  field MetadataFilter MetadataFilter
  field Limit int
func GetJobForRun func(ctx context.Context, runtime WorkflowRuntime, req GetJobForRunRequest) (*JobRunnable, error)
type GetJobForRunRequest struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field JobWorker JobWorker
  field TaskWorkers []TaskWorker
  field WorkerID string
  field LeaseDuration time.Duration
  field Logger *log/slog.Logger
  field AwaitThreshold time.Duration
type GetJobLeaseRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.GetJobLeaseRequest
func GetJobRun func(ctx context.Context, runtime WorkflowRuntime, req GetJobRunRequest) (GetJobRunResponse, error)
type GetJobRunRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.GetJobRunRequest
type GetJobRunResponse = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.GetJobRunResponse
type InputReference = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.InputReference
func IsAppError func(err error) bool
func IsConflict func(err error) bool
func IsExecutionLeaseLost func(err error) bool
func IsExistingJobMismatch func(err error) bool
func IsSystemError func(err error) bool
type JobAttempt = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobAttempt
type JobAttemptOutcomeChapter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobAttemptOutcomeChapter
type JobContext interface
  method AwaitDuration func(waitFor Duration) error
  method AwaitJobs func(jobIds ...string) error
  method DoTask func(policy RunPolicy, taskType string, data TaskData) (TaskData, error)
  method GetJobKey func() JobKey
  method Logger func() *log/slog.Logger
  method SubmitJob func(ctx context.Context, submit SubmitJob) (JobKey, error)
  method SubmitRestartJob func(ctx context.Context, restart SubmitRestartJob) (JobKey, error)
type JobData = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskData
type JobEndEvent struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field AttemptNumber int
  field Output JobData
  field Err error
  field At time.Time
type JobFailedError = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobFailedError
type JobHandle = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle
type JobInfo = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobInfo
type JobKey = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey
const JobPrereqComplete github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobPrereqCondition = "complete"
type JobPrereqCondition = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobPrereqCondition
const JobPrereqSuccess github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobPrereqCondition = "success"
type JobPrerequisite = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobPrerequisite
const JobRunCompleted JobRunStatus = "COMPLETED"
const JobRunFailed JobRunStatus = "FAILED"
type JobRunListener interface
  method OnJobEnd func(event JobEndEvent)
  method OnJobStart func(event JobStartEvent)
  method OnTaskEnd func(event TaskEndEvent)
  method OnTaskStart func(event TaskStartEvent)
const JobRunNotLeaseable JobRunStatus = "NOT_LEASEABLE"
type JobRunOutcome struct
  field Status JobRunStatus
  field LeaseAcquired bool
  field Output JobData
  field JobError error
  field JobStatus *JobStatus
  field NextNeed *string
  field WaitForJobIDs []string
  field MissingCapability *string
type JobRunStatus string
type JobRunSummary = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobRunSummary
const JobRunSuspended JobRunStatus = "SUSPENDED"
type JobRunnable struct
method JobRunnable.JobKey func() JobKey
method JobRunnable.LeaseAcquired func() bool
method JobRunnable.Outcome func() (JobRunOutcome, bool)
method JobRunnable.Run func(listener JobRunListener) (JobRunOutcome, error)
type JobStart = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStart
type JobStartChapter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStartChapter
type JobStartEvent struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field AttemptNumber int
  field Input JobData
  field At time.Time
type JobStatus = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus
const JobStatusActive github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "ACTIVE"
const JobStatusAwaitingFuture github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "AWAITING_FUTURE"
const JobStatusCancelled github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "CANCELLED"
const JobStatusCompleted github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "COMPLETED"
const JobStatusCrashConcern github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "CRASH_CONCERN"
const JobStatusExpired github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "EXPIRED"
const JobStatusPendingJobs github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "PENDING_JOBS"
const JobStatusReady github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStatus = "READY"
type JobStore = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobStore
type JobSummary = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSummary
type JobTaskFilter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobTaskFilter
func JobTypeFromNextNeed func(nextNeed string) string
type JobWorker interface
  method Name func() string
  method Run func(JobContext, JobData) (JobData, error)
type ListChaptersRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListChaptersRequest
type ListJobsRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobsRequest
type ListJobsResponse = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobsResponse
type ListScheduleRunsRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListScheduleRunsRequest
type ListScheduleRunsResponse = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListScheduleRunsResponse
type ListSchedulesRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListSchedulesRequest
type ListSchedulesResponse = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListSchedulesResponse
const MaxListJobsPageSize untyped int = 200
func Metadata func() MetadataFilter
type MetadataFilter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.MetadataFilter
type MetadataPredicate = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.MetadataPredicate
func MetadataPredicates func(filter MetadataFilter) ([]MetadataPredicate, error)
func NewArtifact func(name string, opener func() (io.ReadCloser, int64, error), cleanup func() error) Artifact
func NewArtifactFromBytes func(name string, data []byte) Artifact
func NewArtifactFromFile func(name string, filePath string) (Artifact, error)
func NewArtifactFromFileNoCleanup func(name string, filePath string) (Artifact, error)
func NewArtifactFromReader func(name string, r io.Reader, size int64) Artifact
func NewEngineBuilder func() *EngineBuilder
func NewSystemError func(payload SystemErrorPayload) error
func NewTaskContext func(jobKey JobKey, step int64, logger *log/slog.Logger, await func(time.Time) error, awaitJobs func(...string) error) TaskContext
func NewTaskData func(data any, artifacts ...Artifact) (TaskData, error)
func NewTaskDataOrPanic func(data any, artifacts ...Artifact) TaskData
func NewTimeoutError func(kind string, after time.Duration, scope string, inputRef *InputReference, retryable bool) error
type NonRetryableError = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.NonRetryableError
type PollWorkRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.PollWorkRequest
type PutChapterRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.PutChapterRequest
const ReplayCacheMissAwaitJobsPending ReplayCacheMissReason = "await_jobs_pending"
const ReplayCacheMissAwaitNotReady ReplayCacheMissReason = "await_not_ready"
type ReplayCacheMissError struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field TaskType string
  field Ordinal int64
  field Attempt int
  field Reason ReplayCacheMissReason
method ReplayCacheMissError.Error func() string
const ReplayCacheMissJobResultMissing ReplayCacheMissReason = "job_result_missing"
type ReplayCacheMissReason string
const ReplayCacheMissTaskResultMissing ReplayCacheMissReason = "task_result_missing"
type ReplayObserver interface
  method OnJobEnd func(event JobEndEvent)
  method OnJobStart func(event JobStartEvent)
  method OnTaskEnd func(event TaskEndEvent)
  method OnTaskStart func(event TaskStartEvent)
type ReplayRunRequest struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Observer ReplayObserver
  field JobWorker JobWorker
type RescheduleExecutionRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RescheduleExecutionRequest
type RestartExtraChapter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RestartExtraChapter
type RetryPolicy = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RetryPolicy
type RunPolicy = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RunPolicy
type RuntimeBuildOptions struct
  field Logger *log/slog.Logger
  field MaxActive int
  field AwaitRecycleThreshold time.Duration
  field PollTenantId string
type ScheduleFailurePolicy = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleFailurePolicy
type ScheduleInfo = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo
type ScheduleKey = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleKey
type ScheduleMutationRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest
type ScheduleOverlapPolicy = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleOverlapPolicy
type ScheduleRunSummary = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleRunSummary
type ScheduleSpec = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleSpec
type ScheduleState = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleState
type ScheduleTarget = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleTarget
type ScheduleTrigger = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleTrigger
type ScheduleTriggerKind = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleTriggerKind
func SetTaskInputStorageEnabled func(enabled bool)
type SimpleTaskData = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SimpleTaskData
type StoredArtifact = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.StoredArtifact
type SubmitJob = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitJob
type SubmitJobRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitJobRequest
type SubmitRestartJob = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitRestartJob
type SubmitRestartJobRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitRestartJobRequest
type SystemError = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SystemError
type SystemErrorOutcome = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SystemErrorOutcome
type SystemErrorPayload = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SystemErrorPayload
type TaskAttempt = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskAttempt
type TaskAttemptOutcomeChapter = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskAttemptOutcomeChapter
const TaskAttemptStateFailed untyped string = "FAILED"
const TaskAttemptStateLeased untyped string = "LEASED"
const TaskAttemptStateReady untyped string = "READY"
const TaskAttemptStateRunning untyped string = "RUNNING"
const TaskAttemptStateSucceeded untyped string = "SUCCEEDED"
const TaskAttemptStateWaiting untyped string = "WAITING"
type TaskCompletion struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Step int64
  field Error error
type TaskContext struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field Step int64
  field Logger *log/slog.Logger
method TaskContext.AwaitDuration func(waitFor Duration) error
method TaskContext.AwaitJobs func(jobIds ...string) error
method TaskContext.SubmitJob func(ctx context.Context, submit SubmitJob) (JobKey, error)
method TaskContext.SubmitRestartJob func(ctx context.Context, restart SubmitRestartJob) (JobKey, error)
type TaskData = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskData
type TaskDeterminismMeta struct
  field Ordinal int64 `json:"ordinal"`
  field TaskType string `json:"task_type"`
  field WorkerID string `json:"worker_id,omitempty"`
  field CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at,omitempty"`
  field Attempt int `json:"attempt,omitempty"`
  field MaxAttempts int `json:"max_attempts,omitempty"`
  field NextAttemptAt *time.Time `json:"next_attempt_at,omitempty"`
  field BackoffMillis int64 `json:"backoff_ms,omitempty"`
  field Retryable *bool `json:"retryable,omitempty"`
  field InputHash string `json:"input_hash,omitempty"`
  field InputRef *InputReference `json:"input_ref,omitempty"`
  field RunPolicy *RunPolicy `json:"run_policy,omitempty"`
  field InputPayload encoding/json.RawMessage `json:"input_payload,omitempty"`
  field Version int `json:"version,omitempty"`
type TaskEndEvent struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field TaskType string
  field Ordinal int64
  field AttemptNumber int
  field Output TaskData
  field Err error
  field At time.Time
type TaskError = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskError
const TaskErrorKindApp untyped string = "APP"
const TaskErrorKindSystem untyped string = "SYSTEM"
const TaskErrorKindTimeout untyped string = "TIMEOUT"
type TaskHandle interface
  method CreatedAt func() time.Time
  method Data func() (TaskData, error)
  method Finish func(ctx context.Context, taskData TaskData) error
  method JobKey func() JobKey
  method Metadata func() encoding/json.RawMessage
  method TaskOrdinalToComplete func() int64
  method TaskType func() string
type TaskIO = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskIO
type TaskInputMismatchError struct
  field TaskType string
  field Ordinal int64
  field CachedInputHash string
  field ComputedInputHash string
  field CachedInput encoding/json.RawMessage
  field CachedOutput TaskData
  field CachedOutputErr error
  field Meta TaskDeterminismMeta
method TaskInputMismatchError.CachedInputPayload func() encoding/json.RawMessage
method TaskInputMismatchError.CachedTaskData func() TaskData
method TaskInputMismatchError.CachedTaskDataErr func() error
method TaskInputMismatchError.ChapterMeta func() TaskDeterminismMeta
method TaskInputMismatchError.Error func() string
method TaskInputMismatchError.Unwrap func() error
func TaskInputStorageEnabled func() bool
type TaskOutcome = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskOutcome
const TaskOutcomeStatusFailed untyped string = "FAILED"
const TaskOutcomeStatusSucceeded untyped string = "SUCCEEDED"
type TaskRun = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskRun
type TaskRuntime = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TaskRuntime
type TaskStartEvent struct
  field JobKey JobKey
  field TaskType string
  field Ordinal int64
  field AttemptNumber int
  field Input TaskData
  field At time.Time
type TaskWorker interface
  method Name func() string
  method Run func(context TaskContext, input TaskData) (TaskData, error)
type TimeoutError = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TimeoutError
type TimeoutOutcome = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TimeoutOutcome
type TimeoutPayload = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TimeoutPayload
const TimeoutScopeInvocation untyped string = "invocation"
const TimeoutScopeTotal untyped string = "total"
type TriggerScheduleRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TriggerScheduleRequest
func UnexpectedChapter func(err error) (TaskInputMismatchError, bool)
type UpsertScheduleRequest = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.UpsertScheduleRequest
func WaitForJobToComplete func(ctx context.Context, timeout time.Duration, jobKey JobKey, engine Engine) error
type WorkRegistrationOptions struct
  field MetadataFilter MetadataFilter
type WorkSet struct
  field JobWorker JobWorker
  field TaskWorkers map[string]TaskWorker
  field Options WorkRegistrationOptions
type Worker interface
type WorkflowRuntime = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.WorkflowRuntime

package github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/direct
type Config struct
  field PostgresDSN string
  field BlobStoreURI string
  field MaxInlineArtifactBytes int64
  field Logger *log/slog.Logger
type EmbeddedRuntime struct
  field Runtime *Runtime
method EmbeddedRuntime.Shutdown func()
func New func(db *gorm.io/gorm.DB, cfg Config) (*Runtime, error)
func NewFromConfig func(cfg Config) (*Runtime, error)
type Runtime = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/direct/internal/directimpl.Runtime
func StartEmbeddedRuntime func(ctx context.Context) (*EmbeddedRuntime, error)

package github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/remote
func New func(baseURL string, httpClient *net/http.Client) (*Runtime, error)
func NewServer func(runtime github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.WorkflowRuntime) net/http.Handler
type Runtime struct
method Runtime.ArchiveJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, key github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaInfo, error)
method Runtime.ArchiveSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.CancelJob func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CancelJobRequest) error
method Runtime.CompleteTaskIfWaiting func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CompleteTaskIfWaitingRequest) error
method Runtime.GetChapter func(ctx context.Context, ref github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterRef) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Chapter, error)
method Runtime.GetJob func(ctx context.Context, jobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobInfo, error)
method Runtime.GetJobLease func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.GetJobLeaseRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ExecutionLease, error)
method Runtime.GetJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, key github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaInfo, error)
method Runtime.GetSchedule func(ctx context.Context, key github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.ListChapters func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListChaptersRequest) ([]github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Chapter, error)
method Runtime.ListJobSchemas func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobSchemasRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobSchemasResponse, error)
method Runtime.ListJobs func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobsRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobsResponse, error)
method Runtime.ListScheduleRuns func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListScheduleRunsRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListScheduleRunsResponse, error)
method Runtime.ListSchedules func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListSchedulesRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListSchedulesResponse, error)
method Runtime.OpenArtifact func(ctx context.Context, ref github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactRef) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactReader, error)
method Runtime.PauseSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.PollWork func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.PollWorkRequest) ([]github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ExecutionLease, error)
method Runtime.PutChapter func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.PutChapterRequest) error
method Runtime.RegisterJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RegisterJobSchemaRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaInfo, error)
method Runtime.ResumeSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.SubmitJob func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitJobRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.SubmitRestartJob func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitRestartJobRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.TriggerSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TriggerScheduleRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.UpsertSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.UpsertScheduleRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)

package github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/sqlite
type Config struct
  field DSN string
  field DBPath string
  field BlobDir string
  field BlobStoreURI string
  field MaxInlineArtifactBytes int64
  field Logger *log/slog.Logger
  field WorkerID string
type EmbeddedRuntime struct
  field Runtime *Runtime
method EmbeddedRuntime.Shutdown func()
func New func(db *database/sql.DB, opts ...Option) (*Runtime, error)
func NewFromConfig func(ctx context.Context, cfg Config) (*Runtime, error)
type Option func(*runtimeOptions)
type Runtime struct
method Runtime.ArchiveJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, key github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaInfo, error)
method Runtime.ArchiveSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.CancelJob func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CancelJobRequest) error
method Runtime.Close func(ctx context.Context) error
method Runtime.CompleteJobWithLeaseByID func(ctx context.Context, jobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey, leaseID string, workerID string, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CompleteExecutionRequest) error
method Runtime.CompleteTaskIfWaiting func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.CompleteTaskIfWaitingRequest) error
method Runtime.GetChapter func(ctx context.Context, ref github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ChapterRef) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Chapter, error)
method Runtime.GetJob func(ctx context.Context, jobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobInfo, error)
method Runtime.GetJobLease func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.GetJobLeaseRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ExecutionLease, error)
method Runtime.GetJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, key github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaInfo, error)
method Runtime.GetSchedule func(ctx context.Context, key github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleKey) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.KeepAliveLeaseByID func(ctx context.Context, jobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey, leaseID string, workerID string, leaseDuration time.Duration) error
method Runtime.KeepAliveLeaseByIDWithExpiry func(ctx context.Context, jobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey, leaseID string, workerID string, leaseDuration time.Duration) (time.Time, error)
method Runtime.ListChapters func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListChaptersRequest) ([]github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.Chapter, error)
method Runtime.ListJobSchemas func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobSchemasRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobSchemasResponse, error)
method Runtime.ListJobs func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobsRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListJobsResponse, error)
method Runtime.ListScheduleRuns func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListScheduleRunsRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListScheduleRunsResponse, error)
method Runtime.ListSchedules func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListSchedulesRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ListSchedulesResponse, error)
method Runtime.OpenArtifact func(ctx context.Context, ref github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactRef) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ArtifactReader, error)
method Runtime.PauseSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.PollWork func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.PollWorkRequest) ([]github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ExecutionLease, error)
method Runtime.PutChapter func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.PutChapterRequest) error
method Runtime.RegisterJobSchema func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RegisterJobSchemaRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobSchemaInfo, error)
method Runtime.RescheduleJobWithLeaseByID func(ctx context.Context, jobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey, leaseID string, workerID string, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.RescheduleExecutionRequest) error
method Runtime.ResumeSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleMutationRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
method Runtime.SubmitJob func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitJobRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.SubmitJobWithLeaseByID func(ctx context.Context, parentJobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey, leaseID string, workerID string, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitJobRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.SubmitRestartJob func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitRestartJobRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.SubmitRestartJobWithLeaseByID func(ctx context.Context, parentJobKey github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobKey, leaseID string, workerID string, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.SubmitRestartJobRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.TriggerSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.TriggerScheduleRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.JobHandle, error)
method Runtime.UpsertSchedule func(ctx context.Context, req github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.UpsertScheduleRequest) (github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb.ScheduleInfo, error)
func StartEmbeddedRuntime func(ctx context.Context) (*EmbeddedRuntime, error)
func WithBlobStoreURI func(uri string) Option
func WithLogger func(logger *log/slog.Logger) Option
func WithMaxInlineArtifactBytes func(limit int64) Option
func WithWorkerID func(workerID string) Option

package github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/toy
type JobIDGenerator = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/toy/internal/toyimpl.JobIDGenerator
func New func(opts ...Option) *Runtime
type Option = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/toy/internal/toyimpl.Option
type Runtime = github.com/colony-2/jobdb/pkg/jobdb/runtime/toy/internal/toyimpl.Runtime
func WithJobIDGenerator func(gen JobIDGenerator) Option
func WithLogger func(logger *log/slog.Logger) Option
